title: Web Proxies
html:
Web Proxies

Burp Shortcuts

Send to repeater

[`CTRL+R`]

Go to repeater

[`CTRL+SHIFT+R`]

Send to intruder

[`CTRL+I`]

Go to intruder

[`CTRL+SHIFT+I`]

URL encode

[`CTRL+U`]

URL decode

[`CTRL+SHIFT+U`]

ZAP Shortcuts

Toggle intercept on/off

[`CTRL+B`]

Go to replacer

[`CTRL+R`]

Go to encode/decode/hash

[`CTRL+E`]

Firefox Shortcuts

Force Refresh Page

[`CTRL+SHIFT+R`]
